product: GitLab REST API v4 — CI/CD job artifacts

auth.note: sent to the GitLab API origin only; never forwarded to a redirect target on a different scheme/host/port, and never logged or embedded in error text

success.body: JSON array of pipelines: id, iid, project_id, status, source, ref, sha, web_url

permission_masked.meaning: GitLab answers 404 both for a missing project and for a token without permission; the client must surface this ambiguity, not report it as expiry

query.page: offset pagination, follow x-next-page until empty

success.body: JSON array of jobs: id, name, stage, status, ref, allow_failure, artifacts[], artifacts_expire_at, web_url

list_pipeline_jobs.artifacts_expire_at: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp or null; null means the artifacts do not expire. Compare against an injected clock, never the wall clock.

success.body: raw zip archive bytes; verify received byte count against Content-Length

redirects.location: may hop within the API origin and then to an object-storage/CDN origin
redirects.auth_rule: keep PRIVATE-TOKEN on same-origin hops; strip PRIVATE-TOKEN and Authorization on any cross-origin hop
redirects.bound: redirect following must be bounded (loop protection)
